title: Impact-Transpar
description: Schema for indicators of a charity's operational transparency, epistemic humility, and overall operating scope.

source.description: A unified, programmatic data structure for referencing the source of an extracted data point.

source_type.description: The strict category of the source document.

source_index.description: For attached PDF document sources, the 0-based index of the attached document (among all attached documents) where the data was found.

page_number.description: For attached PDF document sources, the 1-based absolute index of the page (in that attached document) where the data was found.

search_result_index.description: For web_search sources, the 0-based index of the search result snippet used.

quote.description: The exact verbatim wording quoted from the source, used for verification and text-fragment generation.

resolved_url.description: The fully resolved deep-link URL (e.g., with #page=N or #:~:text=...) to the specific source evidence. This is populated programmatically.

transparency_indicators.description: Indicators of operational transparency and epistemic humility.
